visual_summary: Pulsating Button is a reusable UI component that pulsates or ripples like a button, suitable for interactive elements with a visual feedback effect.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: Pulsating Button
Description: Pulsating Button is a reusable UI component that pulsates or ripples like a button, suitable for interactive elements with a visual feedback effect.
Style: flat, rounded, background color, text color
Interactions: clickable, hover, animation, pointer events
Tags: pulse, button, interactive, animation, feedback, ui component

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
"use client"

  pulseColor?: string
  duration?: string
  distance?: string
  variant?: "pulse" | "ripple"
}

export const PulsatingButton = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLButtonElement,
  PulsatingButtonProps
>(
  (
    {
      className,
      children,
      pulseColor,
      duration = "1.5s",
      dist
